title: Transgender leader Sonam Chishti attacked in UP: Gunpoint abduction, beating & forced haircut alleged; CM Y... - Bhaskar English
excerpt: Transgender leader Sonam Chishti attacked in UP: Gunpoint abduction, beating & forced haircut alleged; CM Y...  Bhaskar English
summary: Transgender leader Sonam Chishti was allegedly kidnapped at gunpoint, assaulted, and forcibly had her hair cut in Ghazipur after an attack by around 20 men associated with a rival transgender group, during which two transgenders were seriously injured.

title: Transgender Driver Gunned Down in Jaunpur : Community Power Struggle Suspected | Varanasi News
summary: Miscreants shot and killed Gopal Vishwakarma, a member of the transgender community, in Rambagh Colony near St. Patrick's School in Jaunpur district, and police have collected evidence and initiated investigation.

title: Kanwariyas thrash transgender and vandalise wine shop in Uttar Pradesh - The Indian Express
excerpt: Kanwariyas thrash transgender and vandalise wine shop in Uttar Pradesh  The Indian Express
summary: A transgender woman was beaten and her clothes torn by a group of Kanwariyas in Ghaziabad at midnight, after which police rescued her from the angry crowd.

title: UP : Five contract killers held in Prayagraj | Allahabad News
summary: Police in Prayagraj arrested five alleged contract killers for a reported Rs four lakh contract to eliminate Sadiyapur resident Choti Guru Kinnar and recovered firearms, bombs, and mobiles from them.

title: Meerut : Cops lathi - charge as eunuchs clash over turf
summary: On June 10, police in Lalkurti police station, Meerut, used lathi-charge to control two clashing transgender (kinnar) groups after fights over territorial turf, including alleged attacks on police personnel.
